title: More Beacons
description: A mod adding vanilla styles new beacons to get additional effects as well as some fun items/potions.
body:
A mod adding vanilla styles new beacons to get additional effects as well as some fun items/potions.

 

-Nether Beacon:
High End beacon, made with netherite and crying obsidian, give you the following effects:
I. Glowing

II. Fire Resistance

III.Deflector : deflect all projectiles launched toward the player

IV.Piglin Pacifier : disable herd aggresivity of piglin, zombified piglins and hoglins.

IV Bonus : pick 2 effects.

Range of the Nether Beacon is 2 time the size of regular beacon

 

-Phantom block :
Made with phantom membrane, translucent block disapairing with redstone activation?

 

-Phantom beacon :
Kill all phantoms in a radius defined by the level of the beacon.

Unlike other beacons , it only need on pillar of beacon_base blocks,each block add 10 to the radius.

 

-Nether Star Lighter :
Create white fire: can be put upside down,; give wither effect and slowness to entities. Dosen't burn items. Used to light Phantom Beacons
